languages.text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить Сектором Бионика, посвятил жизнь поиску и созданию совершенных имплантов. Не найдя удовлетворения в возможностях технологий Империума, он погрузился в техноересь, сотворяя все более чудовищные устройства. Это привело к схизме в Секторе Бионика, закончившейся кровавой бойней — Вивисектор Мартинакс пожертвовал собой, чтобы убить обезумевшего коллегу. Втолкнув его на операционное ложе Имплантационного трона, он активировал протоколы вивисекции и удерживал Ферренца своим весом, пока манипуляторы не разодрали их обоих на части.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить Сектором Бионика, посвятил жизнь поиску и созданию совершенных имплантов. Не найдя удовлетворения в возможностях технологий Империума, он погрузился в техноересь, сотворяя все более чудовищные устройства. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカを任されたジェネターのフェレンツは、完璧なるインプラントの探求と創造に生涯を捧げた。帝国の技術が持つ能力に満足を見出せなくなったとき、彼はテクノ異端へと堕ち、いっそう怪物じみた装置を次々と生み出していった。これはセクター・ビオニカに分裂を招き、ついには血なまぐさい虐殺へと至った――その中でヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスは、狂気に陥った同僚を道連れにすべく我が身を犠牲にした。すなわち、ヤゼ・マルティナクスはフェレンツを移植王座の手術台へと押し倒し、生体解剖プロトコルを起動させ、操作腕が二人もろともを引き裂くまで、己の体重をもって彼を押さえつけたのである。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.

traits.locale_text: ジェネター・フェレンツは、セクター・ビオニカの外科医を任され、生涯をインプラントの探求と収集に捧げた。噂では、まだ生きている肉から切り取られたバイオニック・アームの収集のために、その湾に別室が設けられたという。

セクター・ビオニカを任されたジェネターのフェレンツは、完璧なるインプラントの探求と創造に生涯を捧げた。帝国の技術が持つ能力に満足を見出せなくなったとき、彼はテクノ異端へと堕ち、いっそう怪物じみた装置を次々と生み出していった。これはセクター・ビオニカに分裂を招き、ついには血なまぐさい虐殺へと至った――その中でヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスは、狂気に陥った同僚を道連れにすべく我が身を犠牲にした。すなわち、ヤゼ・マルティナクスはフェレンツを移植王座の手術台へと押し倒し、生体解剖プロトコルを起動させ、操作腕が二人もろともを引き裂くまで、己の体重をもって彼を押さえつけたのである。

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务，他毕生致力于寻找并打造最完美的植入物。当帝国现有技术无法令其满足时，他便堕入了技术异端，制造出愈发可怕的装置。此事导致仿生区发生分裂，最终酿成一场血腥的屠杀——解剖者杰兹·马丁纳克斯为终结这位疯狂的同僚而牺牲了自己：他将对方推上移植王座的手术台，并启动活体解剖协议，用自己的身体压制住费伦茨，机械触须随即将二人一同撕成碎片。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务，他毕生致力于寻找并打造最完美的植入物。当帝国现有技术无法令其满足时，他便堕入了技术异端，制造出愈发可怕的装置。此事导致仿生区发生分裂，最终酿成一场血腥的屠杀——解剖者杰兹·马丁纳克斯为终结这位疯狂的同僚而牺牲了自己：他将对方推上移植王座的手术台，并启动活体解剖协议，用自己的身体压制住费伦茨，机械触须随即将二人一同撕成碎片。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, consacra toute son existence à chercher et créer des implants parfaits. Ne parvenant pas à se satisfaire des possibilités limitées de la technologie de l'Imperium, il sombra dans la technohérésie et se mit à créer des appareils toujours plus dangereux. Ce comportement mena, au sein du secteur Bionica, à une confrontation violente qui se solda par un massacre sanglant au cours duquel le vivisecteur Martinax se sacrifia pour empêcher son collègue dément de nuire. L'ayant poussé sur la table d'opération du fauteuil d'implantation, Jaze Martinax activa les protocoles de vivisection et immobilisa Ferrenz de tout son poids jusqu'à ce que les manipulateurs finissent de les réduire tous deux en charpie.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, consacra toute son existence à chercher et créer des implants parfaits. Ne parvenant pas à se satisfaire des possibilités limitées de la technologie de l'Imperium, il sombra dans la technohérésie et se mit à créer des appareils toujours plus dangereux. Ce comportement mena, au sein du secteur Bionica, à une confrontation violente qui se solda par un massacre sanglant au cours duquel le vivisecteur Martinax se sacrifia pour empêcher son collègue dément de nuire. L'ayant poussé sur la table d'opération du fauteuil d'implantation, Jaze Martinax activa les protocoles de vivisection et immobilisa Ferrenz de tout son poids jusqu'à ce que les manipulateurs finissent de les réduire tous deux en charpie.

Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, passa toute sa vie à chercher et amasser des implants. On racontait qu'il avait été nécessaire d'ajouter à la baie une salle distincte où accueillir sa collection de bras bioniques achetés, trouvés ou arrachés à des individus encore vivants.

languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando del Sector Bionica, consagró su vida a la búsqueda y fabricación de los implantes perfectos. Desencantado con las escasas prestaciones de la tecnología del Imperium, apeló a la tecnoherejía para desarrollar monstruosos dispositivos. Aquello provocó un cisma en el Sector Bionica que se saldó con una cruenta masacre durante la cual el vivisector Martinax se sacrificó para acabar con la vida de su enloquecido colega: tras empujarlo a la mesa de operaciones del trono de implantación, Jaze Martinax activó los protocolos de vivisección y retuvo a Ferrenz con el peso de su propio cuerpo mientras los manipuladores los despedazaban a ambos.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika'nın başında kalan Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını mükemmel implantları bulmaya ve yaratmaya adadı. İmparatorluk teknolojisinin kapasitesinden tatmin olmayınca giderek daha da korkunç cihazlar yaratarak tekno kâfirliğe sürüklendi. Bu, Sektör Biyonika'da bölünmeye yol açtı ve Dirikesimci Martinax'ın dengesiz meslektaşını öldürmek için kendini feda ettiği kanlı bir katliamla sonuçlandı. Meslektaşını implantasyon tahtının ameliyat masasına iten Jaze Martinax, dirikesim protokollerini etkinleştirdi ve manipülatörler ikisini de parçalayana kadar Ferrenz'i kendi vücut ağırlığıyla aşağıda tuttu.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants. When he failed to find satisfaction in the capabilities of the Imperium's technology, he descended into tech-heresy, creating ever more monstrous devices. This led to a schism in the Sector Bionica, culminating in a bloody massacre in which Vivisector Martinax sacrificed himself to kill his deranged colleague: after pushing him onto the operating table of the implantation throne, Jaze Martinax activated the vivisection protocols and held Ferrenz down with the weight of his own body until the manipulators tore them both to pieces.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika'nın başında kalan Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını mükemmel implantları bulmaya ve yaratmaya adadı. İmparatorluk teknolojisinin kapasitesinden tatmin olmayınca giderek daha da korkunç cihazlar yaratarak tekno kâfirliğe sürüklendi. Bu, Sektör Biyonika'da bölünmeye yol açtı ve Dirikesimci Martinax'ın dengesiz meslektaşını öldürmek için kendini feda ettiği kanlı bir katliamla sonuçlandı. Meslektaşını implantasyon tahtının ameliyat masasına iten Jaze Martinax, dirikesim protokollerini etkinleştirdi ve manipülatörler ikisini de parçalayana kadar Ferrenz'i kendi vücut ağırlığıyla aşağıda tuttu.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz, der nun für den Sektor Bionica verantwortlich war, widmete sein Leben der Suche und Herstellung perfekter Implantate. Als er in den Möglichkeiten der Technologien des Imperiums keine Befriedigung fand, verlor er sich in den Tiefen der Tech-Ketzerei und schuf immer monströsere Geräte. Dies führte zu einem Schisma im Sektor Bionica, das in ein blutiges Massaker mündete, in dessen Verlauf sich Vivisektor Martinax opferte, um seinen verrückten Kollegen zu töten. Nachdem er ihn auf den Operationstisch des Implantationsthrons gestoßen hatte, aktivierte Jaze Martinax die Vivisektionsprotokolle und hielt Ferrenz mit dem Gewicht seines eigenen Körpers fest, bis die Manipulatoren beide Männer in Stücke rissen.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to finding and creating the perfect implants.
